raw.objective: “…to develop a physiologically based pharmacokinetic model for plasma and tissue/organ prediction in children and adults following intravenous and oral dosing of Valproic acid.”
raw.covariates: Tested: organ/tissue WT and volumes, CO, BSA, HT, WT, HCT Included: WT. HT
raw.observations: ADULTS Prediction following multiple oral doses show slight over prediction of data by PBPK model. VPA plasma concentration are 8-9 times higher than in tissue/organs of both adults and children.
raw.dose: Single intravenous doses and multiple oral doses
raw.structure: 10 compartment PBPK model (gut lumen, enterocyte, gut tissue, systemic blood, kidney, liver, brain, spleen, muscle and rest of body)
raw.equations: #”Variability on organ/tissue volumes was introduced via BW. Variability was also introduced on drug specific parameters such as ka, CLint_gluc_int, CLint_gluc_ren, Clint_gluc_hep, Clint_4ene_VPA, Clint_40H_VPA, CLin_50H_VPA, Clint_beta_oxid, N1, N2, K1 and K2. A lognormal distribution was assumed for all parameter with a coefficient of variation of 20%” #scaling of the parameters is not included in the following formulations. These may be retrieved from the cited literature in Ogungbenro et al. MW=theta1 B_P=theta2 fa=theta3 ka=theta4*exp(eta1) Vss=theta5 CL=theta6*exp(eta2) CLint_gluc_int=theta7*exp(eta3) CLint_gluc_ren=theta8*exp(eta4) CLint_gluc_hep=theta9*exp(eta5) CLint_beta_oxid=theta10*exp(eta6) CLint_4ene_VPA=theta11*exp(eta7) CLint_40H_VPA=theta12*exp(eta8) CLint_50H_VPA=theta13*exp(eta9) CLliv_tot=CLint_gluc_hep+CLint_beta_oxid+CLint_4ene_VPA+CLint_40H_VPA+CLint_50H_VPA N1=theta14 K1=theta15 N2=theta16 K2=theta17 V_p=theta18 V_kid=theta19 V_liv=theta20 V_gut=theta21 V_ent=theta22 V_br=theta23 V_sp=theta24 V_mu=theta25 V_T=V_ent+V_gut+V_kid+V_liv+V_br+V_sp+V_mu V_re=70-V_T Q_p=theta26#Cardiac Output : CO Q_kid=theta27 Q_liv=theta28 Q_gut=theta29 Q_ent=theta30 Q_br=theta31 Q_sp=theta32 Q_mu=theta33 Q_T=Q_ent+Q_gut+Q_kid+Q_liv+Q_br+Q_sp+Q_mu Q_re=Q_p-Q_T Kp_kid=theta34 Kp_liv=theta35 Kp_gut=theta36 Kp_br=theta37 Kp_sp=theta38 Kp_mu=theta39 Kp_re=theta40 #Differential Equations C_ent=A2/V_ent C_gut=A3/V_gut C_p=A4/V_p C_kid=A5/V_kid C_liv=A6/V_liv C_br=A7/V_br C_sp=A8/V_sp C_mu=A9/V_mu C_re=A10/V_re # Gut dA1/dt=-ka_Alum*A1#Lumen dA2/dt= -ka_Alum*A1 -Q_ent*C_ent -CLint_gluc_int*C_ent#Enterocyte dA3/dt= (Q_gut+Q_ent)*(C_p-(C_gut/Kp_gut)) #Gut tissue # Systemic Blood dA4/dt=(((Q_he+Q_gut+Q_ent+Q_sp)*C_liv)/Kp_liv) +((Q_kid*C_kid)/Kp_kid) +((Q_mu*C_mu)/Kp_mu) +((Q_br*C_br)/Kp_br) +((Q_re*C_re)/Kp_re) +(Q_he+Q_gut+Q_ent+Q_kid+Q_mu+Q_br+Q_sp+Q_re)*C_p # Kidney dA5/dt=Q_kid*(C_p-(C_kid/Kp_kid)) –((CLin_gluc_ren*C_kid*f_ub)/Kp_kid) # Liver dA6/dt=(Q_he*(C_p-(C_liv/Kp_liv))) + ((Q_gut+Q_ent)*C_gut)/Kp_gut) -(((Q_gut+Q_ent)*C_liv)/Kp_liv) +((Q_sp*C_sp)/Kp_sp) -((Q_sp*C_liv)/Kp_liv) +Q_ent*C_ent -(CLliv_tot*C_liv*f_ub)/Kp_liv # Brain dA7/dt=Q_br*(C_p-(C_br/Kp_br)) # Spleen dA8/dt=Q_sp*(C_p-(C_sp/Kp_sp)) # Muscle dA9/dt=Q_mu*(C_p-(C_mu/Kp_mu)) # Rest of body dA10/dt=Q_re*(C_p-(C_re/Kp_re)) Cipred=C_p Cobs=Cipred#no error model reported
raw.parameter_values: theta1=144.21 theta2=0.55 theta3=1 theta4=2.0 theta5=10 theta6=0.53 theta7= 0.0091 theta8= 7.09 theta9= 1.25 theta10= 7.61 theta11= 0.043 theta12= 1.10 theta13= 0.82 theta14= 1.54 theta15= 11.9 theta16=0.194 theta17=164 theta18=5.3 theta19=0.31 theta20=1.8 theta21=1.7 theta22=0.12 theta23=1.45 theta24=0.15 theta25=29 theta26=356.31 theta27=79.5 theta28=25.38 theta29=54.6 theta30=21.38 theta31=46.8 theta32=11.7 theta33=66.3 theta34=0.32 theta35=0.23 theta36=0.36 theta37=0.17 theta38=0.25 theta39=0.52 theta40=0.40 omega1=0.04 omega2=0.04 omega3=0.04 omega4=0.04 omega5=0.04 omega6=0.04 omega7=0.04 omega8=0.04 omega9=0.04

extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Single intravenous doses and multiple oral doses
study.objective: “…to develop a physiologically based pharmacokinetic model for plasma and tissue/organ prediction in children and adults following intravenous and oral dosing of Valproic acid.”

covariates.raw: Tested: organ/tissue WT and volumes, CO, BSA, HT, WT, HCT Included: WT. HT

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
